title: Annual training coordination package
mission_or_training_goal: Build an advisory annual training package that prioritizes readiness, administration, supportability, and useful evaluation.
constraints: Mixed readiness levels across the formation
Limited time for pre-AT coordination during drill weekends
Need to protect high-value training time from admin churn
intelligence_question: What public-source environmental or regional conditions should inform training assumptions for this annual training period?
c2_objective: Preserve reliable reporting, accountability, and leader synchronization over a multi-day reserve training period.
support_objective: Build a support concept that protects training time and reduces avoidable reserve admin friction.
